title: Gendos everyday life
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's everyday life?             Quote Post by Xenogil » Sat Jun 26, 2004 5:36 pm What do you think he does when he gets home after a long day's work? What you think his residence looks like? I know that he travels a lot, but when he's home, what do you think goes on?

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sat Jun 26, 2004 5:43 pm Wow, that's never really explored now is it? I think he probably plops down on the couch, cracks open a cold one and watches... AQUA TEEN HUNGER FORCE!!! I'm so sorry. Edit: He lives in a cold, crappy apartment, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:08 pm heh heh, number one in the hood G. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:23 pm I see the guy having a big empty house with a large libary were he spends what little time he has off reading old musty books on the dead sea scrolls. The real question is if he has Rei over at all . . . .

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jun 26, 2004 7:06 pm I think he never goes home. he probably just stayed at NERV all day and night with all the crap going on, but he probably had a personel quarters and a bed. he would still watch ATHF, he would relate to frylock so much, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sat Jun 26, 2004 7:38 pm cain luppus wrote: he would realte to frylock so much, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jun 26, 2004 8:44 pm lmao theres no need to say sorry... man I can't stop laughing

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sat Jun 26, 2004 8:50 pm maybe he takes tap lessons? ballet? XD

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 27, 2004 12:31 am What does Gendo do in his free time? Good question.... Knowing him, he probably spends as little time as he can doing personal stuff. I wouldn't be surprised if he even lived at the HQ. He's so obsessed with his work, in many senses, I doubt he really leaves it that often, he probably has some neglected flat on the surface that he rarely stays at. In his free time, I'll bet he sits around and obsesses over Yui, perhaps he reads philosophy....

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jun 27, 2004 1:06 am Gendo = Zen buddhist?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sun Jun 27, 2004 4:49 am Free time? whos cares. The better question is what exactly does he do while he's working? We only see him sitting around looking suspicious and dropping in some important dialogue here and there. I wonder how much he gets paid...

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jun 27, 2004 7:39 am Like any executive, he sits around telling everyone else what to do, how to do it, that they need to cut costs, and abusing the staff. All this while he make twice as much as the rest of the staff put together. (Boy, does that sound cynical and bitter)

[]:             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Sun Jun 27, 2004 8:03 am Have you ever seen ReDeath? Gendo's a pimp. ::ducks incoming salvo::

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Jun 27, 2004 10:59 am

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jun 27, 2004 12:23 pm wow, thats... freaking awesome

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 27, 2004 12:34 pm Vulkurt wrote: Gendo's a pimp.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jun 27, 2004 2:22 pm http://www.gabe-e.com/gendo/fanart/gendotablesmall.jpg http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/gendoikari/fanart/spraypaint.jpg http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/gendoikari/fanart/gendoback.jpg be scared, be very scared

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jun 28, 2004 1:37 pm You know what's sad? I can only see one of those links, and that's enough to scar me for life.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 28, 2004 2:14 pm When next I revise the board rules, posting Gendo smut will definitely be prohibited. :x

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jun 28, 2004 2:44 pm Thank god. ;)
